new_cascade_issues.title: Mass budget violation due to marble material
new_cascade_issues.description: Marble is significantly heavier than the original structural material, causing mass budget overruns and violating L1-MAS-001 requirement.

new_cascade_issues.title: Shock test required due to material change
new_cascade_issues.description: The use of marble as a structural material necessitates retesting for shock response, which is currently pending (NCR-2024-041).

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal conductivity impact on ΔT
new_cascade_issues.description: Marble has different thermal properties compared to the original material, potentially affecting thermal gradients and violating L1-THM-001 requirement.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
new_missing_tests.reason: Material change requires retesting for shock response.
